privileged_info_summary: Patient Diana Prince is a 30-year-old synthetic female patient (DOB 1995-05-15) created for testing the OSCAR EMR antenatal record initialization task. The Last Menstrual Period is set to exactly 8 weeks prior to the task execution date, placing the patient in early second trimester (medically appropriate for antenatal care initiation). The Estimated Delivery Date is calculated as 280 days after LMP, consistent with Naegele's Rule and obstetric standards. OSCAR EMR login credentials are oscardoc/oscar with PIN 1117. All patient data and credentials are test/synthetic data created by the benchmark task setup scripts.
